candidates.snippet: The rotary drilling rig stood idle for extended periods while utility diversions were completed, which pushed the achieved rate for the soil drilling item above the tendered rate.
The rig also stood waiting for the Engineer's instruction to core into rock, raising the rock drilling rate over the tendered rate.
Five additional standard penetration tests were instructed and remeasured on site beyond the tendered quantity.
During excavation an unforeseen obstruction was encountered that required removal; this work was not priced in the tender and was carried out as an additional item.
